input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.5.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.5.3.2
            TITLE: any fuel tank that is made from a flexible material, for example a bladder fuel cell or a bag

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.5.3.2: Any Fuel Tank that is made from a flexible material, for example a bladder fuel cell or a bag
IC.5.3.2 Any Fuel Tank that is made from a flexible material, for example a bladder fuel cell or a bag 
tank: 
a. Must be enclosed inside a rigid fuel tank container which is securely attached to the 
vehicle structure.   
b. The Fuel Tank container may be load carrying

final_answer: Any Fuel Tank that is made from a flexible material, for example a bladder fuel cell or a bag IC.5.3.2 Any Fuel Tank that is made from a flexible material, for example a bladder fuel cell or a bag tank: a. Must be enclosed inside a rigid fuel tank container which is securely attached to the vehicle structure. b. The Fuel Tank container may be load carrying
